defectBeforeRepair.finding: The original five-slide output was a polished promotional teaser, not a professional chapter-launch decision artifact.
defectBeforeRepair.repair: Rebuilt the sequence around evidence, a visibly derived four-week plan, operating commitments, explicit decisions, and one recommendation. Added editable plan and decision layouts rather than stretching the existing promotional templates.

outputs.latestRevision: 2026-07-15 23:06 CT: replaced the renderer's repeated first-slide cover copy with an intentional executive framing line; refreshed the editable PowerPoint, PDF round trip, review frames, contact sheet, and all three Intent Profile comparisons

boundary: This is the first privacy-safe candidate intended for a real professional audience. It is ready for cold review but has not received an external send-or-revise judgment and is not externally approved.
